title: 32" XL Dog Pooper Scoopers No Bending Foldable Long Handle Pet Poop Picker Upper for Gravel Dirt Grass
features: 🌿 Back Hurts? We Got You: Say goodbye to back strain! iPetba’s 32 inch long handle dog pooper scooper for yard lets you clean up without bending, perfect for tall users, seniors, or anyone with back or knee issues. Scoop with ease, comfort, and confidence.

🌿 One Hand Is All You Need: Built with smooth-action, high-tension springs for strong grip power—yet easy to operate with one hand. Comfortable enough for women, seniors, or first-time pet parents to use daily without struggle.

🌿 Fold It, Take It Anywhere: Take it anywhere! iPetba’s dog poop picker upper is lightweight and foldable for easy storage at home or in the car. Perfect for road trips, camping, park walks, or on-the-go cleanups. Always ready when your pup is.

🌿 Big Waste? No Problem: The wide scoop head handles even large dog waste in one go. Serrated teeth grip securely, and the jaw is compatible with most standard poop bags—keeping cleanup sanitary and hands-free.

🌿 Hate the Smell? So Do We: Made from eco-friendly, heavy-duty materials with a non-stick surface. Rinses clean in seconds, resists rust and odor buildup, and holds up to daily use—no mess, no smell, no fuss.

🌿 Grass, Gravel, Sand? Yup: Dual-tooth scoop design (flat + serrated) picks up waste easily on grass, gravel, sand, and concrete—without damaging your lawn. Efficient and reliable cleanup, wherever your dog goes
